info.title: Agent Trust Gate Local Gateway API
info.description: A localhost-only pre-action trust decision and evidence API. The OpenAPI contract describes the local gateway interface. It does not expose a public service, execute actions, bill customers, authenticate real-world identities, guarantee legality, or prove compliance.

servers.description: Local machine gateway only. Do not expose publicly.

tags.name: Trust
tags.description: Local trust decisions and approval evidence.

200.description: Gateway health and local API-key mode status.

405.description: The endpoint does not support this HTTP method.

get.summary: Read the local gateway OpenAPI contract
get.description: Does not require an API key. The response request ID is returned in the X-ATG-Request-ID header.

405.description: The endpoint does not support this HTTP method.

get.description: Returns local discovery metadata only and does not require an API key. The request ID is returned in the X-ATG-Request-ID header.

405.description: The endpoint does not support this HTTP method.

get.description: Returns local usage, allowance, over-limit, and upgrade-required signals. Requires a valid local API key only when the gateway runs in API-key mode. Purchase, automatic purchase, and billing remain disabled.

200.description: Local entitlement and disabled commerce signals.

405.description: The endpoint does not support this HTTP method.

get.summary: Read the local commercial readiness snapshot
get.description: Returns deterministic planning scores and gaps only. It does not implement hosting, payments, billing, automatic purchase, marketing automation, or action execution.

405.description: The endpoint does not support this HTTP method.

get.description: Returns planning checks and safe configuration guidance only. It does not deploy Agent Trust Gate, change the localhost binding, or expose a public service.

405.description: The endpoint does not support this HTTP method.

get.description: Returns deterministic security planning checks and gaps only. It does not certify security, deploy Agent Trust Gate, change the localhost binding, or expose a public service.

405.description: The endpoint does not support this HTTP method.

get.summary: Read local rate-limit and abuse-control status
get.description: Returns local runtime counters and deterministic signals only. API-key mode protects client status when enabled. This is not production-grade abuse prevention and does not purchase capacity.

405.description: The endpoint does not support this HTTP method.

get.summary: Read local monitoring and operational health
get.description: Returns local runtime and request-log signals only. It does not provide production monitoring, external alerting, public uptime guarantees, deployment, or action execution.

200.description: Local monitoring and operational health report.

405.description: The endpoint does not support this HTTP method.

post.description: Returns a trust decision only. Agent Trust Gate does not execute the described action.

400.description: Invalid JSON, request, or action descriptor.

405.description: The endpoint does not support this HTTP method.

429.description: Client local decision allowance or runtime request limit exceeded.

200.description: Approval packet and optional local save status.

400.description: Invalid JSON, request, or action descriptor.

405.description: The endpoint does not support this HTTP method.

429.description: Client local decision allowance or runtime request limit exceeded.

200.description: Evidence bundle and optional local save status.

400.description: Invalid JSON, request, or action descriptor.

405.description: The endpoint does not support this HTTP method.

429.description: Client local decision allowance or runtime request limit exceeded.

InvalidRequest.description: Invalid JSON, request, or action descriptor.

MethodNotAllowed.description: Unsupported method for a known local gateway route.

ClientIdHeader.name: X-ATG-Client-ID
ClientIdHeader.description: Optional local calling-system identifier. Defaults to local-anonymous.

ApiKeyHeader.name: X-ATG-API-Key
ApiKeyHeader.description: Required on protected endpoints only when local API-key mode is enabled. Local development hardening only; it does not authenticate real-world identities. Raw API keys must not be logged.

LocalApiKey.name: X-ATG-API-Key
LocalApiKey.description: Optional localhost-only API-key gate. Raw API keys must not be logged.

full_target_readiness_percent.description: Must not be interpreted as 100% commercial completion.

safety_statement.description: Planning only: no billing, payment processing, automatic purchase, public hosting, or action execution.
Planning only: no deployment, public exposure, payments, billing, automatic purchase, or action execution.
Planning only: not security, legal, privacy, SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, payment, or production certification.
Local control only; not production-grade abuse prevention, billing, payment processing, or action execution.
Local signal only: no production monitoring, external alerting, public uptime SLA, payment processing, or action execution.

x-atg-safety-statement: The OpenAPI contract describes the local gateway interface. It does not expose a public service, execute actions, bill customers, authenticate real-world identities, guarantee legality, or prove compliance.
